The '''67th annual [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 9 to 18 February 2017 with Dutch filmmaker [[Paul Verhoeven]] as president of the jury.<ref name="67Berlin">{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/globals/festivaldaten/Eckdaten.html |title=The 67th Berlin International Film Festival: Important Dates |access-date=19 October 2016 |work=Berlinale |archive-date=5 September 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180905075145/https://www.berlinale.de/en/globals/festivaldaten/Eckdaten.html |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref name="Verhoeven">{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html|title=Jury President of the Berlinale 2017: Paul Verhoeven|access-date=9 December 2016|work=Berlinale|archive-date=13 February 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180213193955/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>

''[[Django (2017 film)|Django]]'', directed by Etienne Comar, opened the festival.<ref name="Django">{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_35156.html|title=World Premiere of Django to Open the Berlinale 2017|access-date=4 January 2017|work=Berlinale|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170104234929/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_35156.html|archive-date=4 January 2017|url-status=dead}}</ref> The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to the Hungarian film ''[[On Body and Soul]]'' directed by [[Ildikó Enyedi]], which also served as closing film of the festival.<ref name="Golden">{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2017/film/news/berlinale-berlin-film-festival-2017-winners-full-list-1201992021/|title=Berlin Film Festival: 'On Body and Soul' Wins Golden Bear for Best Film|access-date=18 February 2017|work=Variety|date=18 February 2017 }}</ref>

==Juries==
===Main Competition===
* [[Paul Verhoeven]], Dutch filmmaker - Jury President<ref name="Verhoeven" />
* [[Olafur Eliasson]], Icelandic sculptor<ref name="Jury">{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_36692.html|title=Berlinale 2017: International Jury|access-date=31 January 2017|work=Berlinale|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170202074849/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_36692.html|archive-date=2 February 2017|url-status=dead}}</ref>
* Dora Bouchoucha Fourati, Tunisian producer
* [[Maggie Gyllenhaal]], American actress
* [[Julia Jentsch]], German actress
* [[Diego Luna]], Mexican actor and filmmaker
* [[Wang Quan'an]], Chinese filmmaker
[[File:Paul Verhoeven International Jury Berlinale 2017.jpg|thumb|Paul Verhoeven at a press conference at Berlinale 2017]]

===Best First Feature Award===
* [[Jayro Bustamante]], Guatemalan filmmaker<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/best_first_feature_award/index.html|title=GWFF Best First Feature Award|work=Berlinale|date=27 January 2017|access-date=27 January 2017}}</ref>
* [[Clotilde Courau]], French actress (France)
* [[Mahmoud Sabbagh]], Saudi filmmaker, producer, and writer

===Documentary Award===
* Daniela Michel, Mexican film critic<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archive/jahresarchive/2017/04_jury_2017/04_jury_2017.html|title=GLASHÜTTE ORIGINAL – DOCUMENTARY AWARD JURY|work=Berlinale|access-date=15 December 2017}}</ref>
* [[Laura Poitras]], American filmmaker and producer
* [[Samir (filmmaker)|Samir]], Iraqi director and producer

===Short Film Competition===
* Kimberley Drew, American writer, curator and social media manager<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/berlinale_shorts/shorts-presse-detail_34644.html|title=Berlinale Shorts - The 2017 International Short Film Jury: Christian Jankowski, Kimberly Drew and Carlos Nuñez|work=Berlinale|date=13 December 2016|access-date=15 December 2016|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161220205713/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/berlinale_shorts/shorts-presse-detail_34644.html|archive-date=20 December 2016|url-status=dead}}</ref>
* [[Christian Jankowski]], German artist and filmmaker
* Carlos Nuñez, Chilean film producer

==Official Section==

==Official Awards==
The following prizes were awarded:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_generation/index.html#preistraeger_14plus_jugendjury|title=Awards and Juries in the Generation section|access-date=18 February 2017}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_unabh_ngigen_jurys/index.html|title=Prizes of the Independent Juries|work=[[Berlinale]]|access-date=18 February 2017|archive-date=30 August 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170830235433/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_unabh_ngigen_jurys/index.html|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=http://blog.teddyaward.tv/en/|title=TEDDY AWARD Winners 2017|date=17 February 2017|access-date=18 February 2017}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/auszeichnungen__/pue-presse-detail_37204.html|title=The Panorama Audience Awards Go to Insyriated and I Am Not Your Negro|work=[[Berlinale]]|date=18 February 2017|access-date=18 February 2017|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170218232353/https://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/auszeichnungen__/pue-presse-detail_37204.html|archive-date=18 February 2017|url-status=dead}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html|title=Prizes of the International Jury|access-date=18 February 2017|archive-date=13 February 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180213193955/https://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/preise_und_juries/preise_internationale_jury/index.html|url-status=dead}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[On Body and Soul]]'' by [[Ildikó Enyedi]]
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[Félicité (2017 film)|Félicité]]'' by [[Alain Gomis]]
